tagline: You can now use path credential vending to grant short lived credentials to external locations in your Unity Catalog metastore.
what_it_does: You can now use path credential vending to grant short lived credentials to external locations in your Unity Catalog metastore. This page describes how Unity Catalog credential vending functionality supports access to data in Databricks from external processing engines. Credential vending supports external systems that connect to Unity Catalog using the Unity REST API and Apache Iceberg REST catalog.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now use path credential vending to grant short lived credentials to external locations in your Unity Catalog metastore. This page describes how Unity Catalog credential vending functionality supports access to data in Databricks from external…
limitations: Tables with row filters or column masks.
Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines streaming tables.
key_takeaway: You can now use path credential vending to grant short lived credentials to external locations in your Unity Catalog metastore.
